# Cleanup Solution
Review the document "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/docs/prd-csharp-basic-calculator-solution.md" and create a PowerShell script named `Remove-DotnetSlnForCalculator.ps1` in the path `programming\dotnet\csharp\workspace` to reset the exercise by following section 1.13 Cleanup Solution only. Do not proceed to further steps.
